name: lookup_cobol_pattern
description: Look up COBOL syntax patterns and examples by category (data_types, file_handling, program_structure, common_verbs).

category.description: Pattern category: data_types, file_handling, program_structure, common_verbs

name.description: Specific pattern name to look up. Empty returns all entries in the category.

name: lookup_jcl_reference
description: Look up JCL job control language reference by category (statements, common_utilities).

name.description: Specific JCL element to look up. Empty returns all entries in the category.

name: map_mainframe_to_aws
description: Map mainframe components to AWS service equivalents by category (compute, data, middleware, security, monitoring).

category.description: Mapping category: compute, data, middleware, security, monitoring

name.description: Specific mainframe component (e.g. 'CICS', 'DB2', 'VSAM_KSDS', 'RACF', 'MQ_SERIES'). Empty returns all entries in the category.

name: get_migration_pattern
description: Get mainframe migration pattern details (rehost, replatform, refactor, retire, automated_refactor) including steps, timeline, and FSI considerations.

name.description: Pattern name. Empty returns a summary of all patterns.

name: estimate_complexity
description: Estimate mainframe modernization complexity from workload characteristics. All inputs optional — when num_cobol_programs / num_jcl_jobs are missing the result is returned with confidence='low' and missing_inputs populated rather than as an error, so the agent can probe to firm up the estimate. Optional `profile` (CustomerProfile.to_dict()) auto-seeds inputs from the customer profile.

has_mq.description: Whether the workload uses MQ Series

profile.description: Optional CustomerProfile.to_dict(). When supplied, any input the SA didn't pass explicitly is seeded from the profile workload.

name: get_fsi_compliance_check
description: Get FSI regulatory compliance requirements for mainframe migration (SOX, PCI_DSS, FDIC, OCC, GLBA, FFIEC, FINRA_17a-4). Optional customer_profile_summary tailors the response.

regulation.description: Regulation name. Empty returns a general overview.

customer_profile_summary.description: Optional customer context to ground the response (workload, industry segment, decisions). Pass when a customer profile is bound.

name: compare_partner_tools
description: Rank mainframe modernization partner tools (Micro Focus, Blu Age, Heirloom, TCS, Astadia, etc.) for a given workload, pattern, and managed-service preference. Returns the top-N partners by fit, with strengths/weaknesses and FSI considerations.

source_systems.description: Source mainframe systems in scope (e.g. ['COBOL','CICS','DB2','VSAM']). Empty matches any source.

pattern.description: Migration pattern filter: rehost, replatform, refactor, automated_refactor, retire. Empty matches any pattern.

aws_m2_managed_only.description: If true, only return partners whose offering runs on AWS Mainframe Modernization Service (M2).

top_n.description: How many partners to return. Defaults to 5.

customer_profile_summary.description: Optional customer context to ground the recommendation. Pass when a customer profile is bound.

name: compare_services
description: Compare AWS target services for a given mainframe source component (e.g. CICS → ECS vs Lambda vs M2). Returns ranked candidates with fit and when-to-choose guidance.

source.description: Mainframe source component to compare AWS targets for (e.g. 'cics_online', 'db2_zos', 'vsam_ksds', 'ims_db', 'jcl_batch').

candidates.description: Optional subset of AWS candidate services to consider. Empty considers all candidates.

customer_profile_summary.description: Optional customer context to ground the recommendation. Pass when a customer profile is bound.

name: list_taxonomy
description: Discover the argument shapes and category enums of every other tool. Use when you don't know what values 'category', 'pattern', 'regulation', or 'source' accept.

tool_name.description: Specific tool to look up. Empty returns the taxonomy for all tools.
